parts.text:
Great choice! I have saved this nature reference ("A vintage book adorned with a delicate tiara, capturing a timeless elegance under soft, warm lighting.") as our design inspiration. ✦

Let's begin the **Concept** phase. Could you please tell me about:
1. Your **plot dimensions** (width and height in meters)?
2. The **plot orientation** (e.g., North-facing, East-facing)?
3. The **rooms/spaces** you want to include (e.g., 3 bedrooms, double-height living room, kitchen, etc.)?
BUILDING LINE DIMENSIONS 35M X 12M.... THREE FLATS FLOOR PLAN...4 BHK TO CENTRE...2 BHK AND 3 BHK TO THE SIDES...STAIRCASE TO THE SOUTH WITH TWO LIFTS...NORTH SOUTH ORIENTATION

Got it! You want a 35m x 12m building with 3 flats (4BHK center, 2BHK & 3BHK sides), staircase + 2 lifts on the south side, and North-South orientation. Would you like the layout to follow Vastu Shastra principles?
YES GENERATE

Perfect! I'll generate a Vastu-compliant floor plan with:
- 4BHK in center (SW zone for master bedroom)
- 3BHK on one side (NW zone for children/guest rooms)
- 2BHK on other side
- Kitchen in SE zone
- Staircase + 2 lifts on south side
- Northeast kept light (puja/entrance area)
Generating now...

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
FLOOR PLAN DIMESNIONS ARE ONLY 30M LENGTH X 12M BREADTH

Understood! I'll adjust the floor plan dimensions to 30m (length) × 12m (breadth) while keeping all other parameters the same (3 flats with 4BHK center, 2BHK & 3BHK sides, staircase + 2 lifts on south, North-South orientation, and Vastu compliance). Regenerating now with the corrected dimensions. Would you like me to maintain the same room distribution (4BHK center, 2BHK left, 3BHK right)?
FLATS NOT STUCK TO EACH OTHER

Understood! I'll redesign with separate, detached flat structures within the 30m × 12m plot, maintaining clear gaps between each unit. The 4BHK will remain central with 2BHK and 3BHK as standalone structures on either side, all with independent access. Should I maintain the same Vastu zone allocations for each detached flat (e.g., SW master for 4BHK, NW guest for 3BHK, SE kitchens for all)?
YES GENERATE

Perfect! I'll generate standalone structures with gaps between flats, maintaining Vastu zone allocations (SW master for 4BHK, NW guest for 3BHK, SE kitchens for all). Generating now!

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
ADJOINING FLATS SHOULD NOT TOUCH EACH OTHER

Understood! I'll ensure all 3 flats (4BHK center, 2BHK left, 3BHK right) are completely detached with clear air gaps between them, while fitting within the 30m × 12m plot. Each will have independent walls and circulation spaces. Generating now with these adjustments.

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
NO...THEY R STILL NOT INDEPENDENT..THEY SHARE A COMMON WALL..I DO NOT WANT A COMMON ADJOINING FLAT...CREATE AIR GAPS BETWEEN THE FLATS

Got it! I'll redesign the layout to ensure all flats (4BHK center, 2BHK left, 3BHK right) are completely independent with air gaps between them, eliminating any shared walls. Each flat will have its own walls and circulation spaces. Generating now with these adjustments.
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
DISTANCE OF 1.5M AIR GAP BETWEEN THE FLATS
I'm here and listening. Could you rephrase that?
CAN I SHARE A REFERENCE IMAGE OF A FLOOR PLAN THATS IN MY MIND
Absolutely! Sharing a reference image will help me understand your vision better. Please upload or describe the floor plan you have in mind.
THIS ONE
Error: undefined
I couldn't find any reference image attached. Could you please upload or describe the floor plan you have in mind?
I couldn't find any reference image attached. Could you please upload or describe the floor plan you have in mind?
REFERENCE IMAGE
I couldn't find any reference image attached. Could you please upload or describe the floor plan you have in mind?

Great choice! I have saved this nature reference ("Detailed view of a spiral seashell with a warm orange hue on a neutral background.") as our design inspiration. ✦

Let's begin the **Concept** phase. Could you please tell me about:
1. Your **plot dimensions** (width and height in meters)?
2. The **plot orientation** (e.g., North-facing, East-facing)?
3. The **rooms/spaces** you want to include (e.g., 3 bedrooms, double-height living room, kitchen, etc.)?
100 feet x 100 feet...4 bedrooms...double-height living...pool...garden..kids play area

Got it! Let me confirm your requirements: 

- Plot dimensions: 100ft × 100ft (30.48m × 30.48m)
- Rooms: 4 bedrooms, double-height living, pool, garden, kids play area

Would you like the layout to follow Vastu Shastra principles?
yes generate

Perfect! I'll design a Vastu-compliant layout with:
- Northeast: Entrance/prayer area
- Southeast: Kitchen (though not listed, I'll allocate space)
- Southwest: Master bedroom
- Northwest: Other bedrooms
- Central double-height living
- Pool in North/East zones

Generating now... Would you like me to prioritize the garden near the kids' play area?

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
more options..shell shaped
I will start generating more floor plan options for you right away!
Here are the new generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
no...conch shell shape

Understood! I'll design a conch-shell inspired spiral layout with Vastu compliance. The master bedroom will form the 'bulge' at the southwest, living area spiraling inward, and pool/garden following the organic curves. Generating now... Should I make the kids' play area follow the shell's ribbed texture for visual harmony?

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
the shape doesnt match A CONCH

Understood! I'll refine the conch-shell spiral shape more accurately - emphasizing the tapered spiral form with the entrance at the narrow end (northeast per Vastu) and expanding clockwise. The master bedroom will form the large 'body whorl' at southwest. Generating now... Should I add subtle ribbed textures along the curved walls to enhance the shell motif?

I'll start generating your floor plans right away!
Here are the generated concept layouts based on your design requirements:
NEXT SECTION
Moving to the next section. Would you like me to export the current conch-shell spiral layout as a CAD file (DWG/DXF) for further development?
Your DXF file is ready! Import it into AutoCAD Raster Design — it will automatically trace all walls and rooms. Come back after your adjustments and upload the refined drawing here.
